title: Tax Manager / Assistant Tax Manager
description:
Roles & Responsibilities

  • Single Family office or private wealth tax compliance and annual declaration to MAS experience is preferred
  • Manage client portfolio in the area of tax compliance and provide tax advisory services
  • Review, provide recommendations on agreements and/or documents of clients for compliance and risk mitigation purposes
  • Review, provide recommendations, solutions on clients’ portfolio and to understand the clients' needs
  • Assist with the preparation of responses to Tax authorities’ queries and any audits
  • Proficient in MAS reporting requirement
  • Work collaboratively with business areas as well as other corporate functions, such as provide tax technical support and advisory
  • Manage the management fee agreements, supporting documentations and computations.
  • Liaise with clients and collate the necessary information.
  • Preparation tax computations (Corporate & Personal).
  • Preparation detailed computations to calculate tax liability.
  • Submit tax computations/returns to the Inland Revenue Authority of Singapore (“IRAS”).
  • Experienced in various tax matters, including withholding tax S45 Form, COR application, ECI filing, GST submissions.
  • Assist in attending to queries raised by IRAS.
  • Provide advisory and collaborated with cross-functional teams, including auditors and legal advisors, to support client needs and deliver comprehensive tax solutions.
  • Assist with any other matters in relation to tax.

Requirements

  • Familiar with MAS requirements
  • Minimum 8 years related experience, preferably from a private wealth service/ financial services or professional services firm/Accounting firm
  • Experience in SFO tax preparation, review and advisory is an added advantage
  • Must be familiar with Singapore Tax guidelines
  • Self motivated and looking for fast career growth and development
  • Knowledge of Single Family Offices private wealth tax compliance is an added advantage
  • Degree or professional accounting qualifications recognised by ISCA preferred.
  • Being an Accredited Tax Professional with SCTP will be an advantage.
  • Possess passion, initiative, strong technical skills and an analytical mind.
  • Strong interpersonal and business communication skills.

postedCompany.description:
MKG Consulting is a professional one-stop comprehensive Corporate Service Provider. Our professional team members are able to handle and provide quality Business and Corporate services such as Corporate Secretarial, Accounting, Tax Compliance & Advisory, GST, Payroll or Related Financial Services and meet clients' any other business needs and concerns. This way, our clients will be able to focus more on their businesses and what they do best. 


We are driven, dynamic, motivated and a very fast growth local company. We also reward our teams with highly competitive remuneration packages and benefits, along with recognition awards to promote growth and success within the company and for our team members. 


Due to our fast growth, we are currently expanding the team across various departments and if you are a high motivated, driven, responsible individual seeking for new challenges & growth and you could be the potential candidate we are looking for. We strongly welcome you to explore our available positions and reach out to us. Do send us your CV and join our dynamic team specializing in comprehensive corporate and business services including but not limited to corporate secretarial, accounting, tax compliance and advisory (both corporate and individual), Goods and Services Tax (GST), payroll management, employment pass applications, incentives application with EDB and MAS, and setting up of Single Family Offices etc. 


Our dedicated professionals are committed to delivering top-tier services to a diverse portfolio of clients across various industries, notably within financial services. Experience excellence with us as we strive to provide unparalleled support and solutions. We look forward to meeting with you soon to explore the opportunities we have to offer.
postedCompany.name: MKG CONSULTING PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
